identity.name: NexaCorp
identity.description: NexaCorp is a premium corporate brand identity for a professional portfolio and business landing page. It conveys innovation, reliability, and forward-thinking leadership through a modern blue-and-amber palette, clean typography, and geometric visual language.
identity.target: Business professionals, corporate clients, and decision-makers seeking a reliable technology or consulting partner

primary.use: Main brand color, CTA buttons, active states, key headlines

primary_dark.use: Hover states, pressed buttons, deeper emphasis

primary_light.use: Subtle highlights, secondary interactive elements, link hover

secondary.use: Dark backgrounds, hero sections, footer, navbar

accent.use: Decorative accents, badges, star ratings, call-to-action contrast

accent_dark.use: Accent hover states, active accent elements

neutral_light.use: Page backgrounds, light sections, card backgrounds

neutral_dark.use: Dark section backgrounds, secondary text containers

text_dark.use: Primary body text on light backgrounds (contrast ratio 15.4:1 vs white)

text_light.use: Text on dark backgrounds (contrast ratio 15.1:1 vs #0f172a)

white.use: Pure white backgrounds, card surfaces, overlays

accent.use: Slogan, badges, decorative labels, stat numbers

image_style.hero: Abstract gradient with geometric shapes, blue-to-dark corporate feel, modern tech aesthetic with subtle grid patterns and light rays
image_style.about: Professional team collaboration, modern office environment, candid leadership photography
image_style.services: Clean iconography on subtle gradient cards, abstract geometric representations of business concepts

logo_style.style: Minimal, clean lines, geometric shapes, sharp edges
logo_style.icon_concept: Abstract N shape formed by interconnected nodes or angular geometric construction
logo_style.colors: Primary blue #2563eb on white, white on dark #0f172a, monochrome variants

prompt_ingredients.photo_style: High-end corporate photography with shallow depth of field, cool blue-toned lighting, modern glass offices, clean compositions with negative space, editorial quality
prompt_ingredients.logo_style: Minimal geometric wordmark, sharp angular icon, interconnected nodes forming abstract N, clean vector lines, tech-corporate aesthetic, blue on transparent
prompt_ingredients.avoid_global: watermark, text overlay, logo, UI elements, borders, frame, cartoon, 3D render, blurry, pixelated, low quality, worst quality, deformed, oversaturated, clipart, stock photo watermark
